name: cursor-effects
description: Canvas-based cursor trail effects — fairy dust, trailing bubbles, ghost cursors, springy emojis, snowflakes, rainbow trails. Respects prefers-reduced-motion. 10 distinct effects.
use_cases: fairy dust trail on agency/portfolio sites
head: <script src="https://unpkg.com/cursor-effects@latest/dist/browser.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof cursoreffects === 'undefined') return;
  // Only on desktop — skip touch devices
  if (!window.matchMedia('(hover: hover)').matches) return;
  // Options: fairyDustCursor, trailingCursor, ghostCursor, emojiCursor, snowflakeCursor, springyEmojiCursor, followingDotCursor, bubbleCursor
  new cursoreffects.fairyDustCursor({
    colors: ['#5b4dff', '#2dd4bf', '#a78bfa'],
    element: document.body
  });
})();
</script>
